name: madarsa-saas
description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for Madarsa/Idara management - Monorepo

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../shared && npm install
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npm run typecheck && cd ../frontend && npm run typecheck && cd ../shared && npm run typecheck
